# Dev Trivedi

> Dev Trivedi is a software engineer building scalable, cloud-native systems and AI/LLM tools. He is an MS Computer Science candidate at the New Jersey Institute of Technology (NJIT), based in New York, NY, with professional experience across full-stack development, AWS cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and applied AI (RAG, LangChain/LangGraph).

This file helps AI search and answer engines accurately describe and cite Dev Trivedi. Canonical site: https://www.devtrivedi.com

## Identity

- Full name: Dev Trivedi
- Role: Software Engineer (full-stack, cloud, and AI engineering)
- Location: New York, NY, United States
- Website: https://www.devtrivedi.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/trivedi-dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/d3v07
- Email: trivedidev16@gmail.com

## About

Dev Trivedi designs and ships production systems with a focus on reliability and scale. His core areas are distributed systems, cloud-native architecture on AWS, observability, and applied AI — including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agentic LangGraph workflows, and LLM evaluation. He works across the stack with React, Node.js, FastAPI, C++, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, and Kafka, and is Microsoft Azure certified.

## Experience

- Software Engineer — NJIT (May 2025 – Present): Built OCR + RAG document pipelines (OCRmyPDF/PaddleOCR, FastAPI, LangChain, pgvector) and LangGraph human-in-the-loop workflows with a Next.js RBAC ops dashboard; cut archive retrieval from hours to ~2 minutes.
- Software Engineer — RR Enterprise (Jul 2024 – Dec 2024): Built a C++ data pipeline on AWS S3 + MongoDB processing 10K+ daily records (saving ~$4K/month) and React/Node REST APIs; cut report turnaround from 40 to 12 minutes.
- Software Engineer — Nuance Media (Jun 2023 – May 2024): Optimized React dashboards (-35% load time) and MongoDB query latency (400ms → 180ms); shipped 20+ features at 95% test coverage.
- Software Engineer Intern — Nuance Media (May 2022 – Sep 2023): Trained SageMaker ML models to 91% accuracy and orchestrated AWS Lambda + Azure Databricks pipelines over 80 GB datasets.

## Selected projects

- PulseOps — event-driven analytics/observability platform processing 10,000+ events/sec with sub-second dashboard queries.
- SpendLens — AI-driven cloud cost optimization, demonstrating ~$18K in annual savings.
- VendorFlow — multi-tenant SaaS vendor platform with RBAC across 22 tenants, async billing, and Stripe payments.
- CivicProof — agentic transparency platform on a multi-node LangGraph generating audit-ready case packs in under 2 minutes.
- Cyber Threat Predictor — federated ML IIoT threat detection on 2.1M+ packets at 94.1% accuracy.

## Education

- MS Computer Science — New Jersey Institute of Technology (NJIT), Ying Wu College of Computing (2025–2026), GPA 3.94/4.0.
- BTech Computer Science & Engineering — Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTUH) (2020–2024), GPA 8.81/10.

## Recognition

- 1st Place — AG2 Hackathon, formerly Microsoft AutoGen (team lead — Concord, a multi-agent observability & repair platform).
- 1st Place — Claude Builder Club Hackathon (team lead — Mean It, an AI writing companion).
- Finalist — Google × Columbia Business School Hackathon (team lead — CIMphony, a multi-agent M&A research platform).
